summary: Redesigned all rental storefront pages by simplifying the structure and creating a component-based library. This resulted in a 70% increase in user conversion and enabled the marketing team to update pages 84% faster, significantly enhancing operational agility.
paragraphs: Redesigned all rental storefront pages by simplifying the structure and creating a component-based library. This resulted in a 70% increase in user conversion and enabled the marketing team to update pages 84% faster, significantly enhancing operational agility.
Developed a lead-generation solution connecting renters interested in buying their first home, generating over 10k leads per month.
Improved onboarding and leasing/payment workflows, reducing friction and contributing to lower churn across landlord experiences.
